name: Arif Hasan
bio: Met during computer science studies at Dhaka University. We often discuss tech startups and enjoy late-night tea at TSC.

name: Nusrat Jahan
bio: Worked together at a digital agency in Dhaka. She is passionate about UI/UX design and loves visiting art exhibitions.

name: Mahmud Rahman
bio: Childhood friend from Narayanganj. We still play football together on weekends and support the same local team.

name: Farhana Ahmed
bio: Family friend who now lives in Chattogram. We enjoy planning trips together and sharing travel photography.

name: Tanvir Hossain
bio: Met at the local gym. We motivate each other to stay consistent with workouts and occasionally join marathon events.

name: Sadia Karim
bio: Member of our monthly book club. She is an aspiring writer and enjoys deep conversations about literature and poetry.

name: Imran Chowdhury
bio: Met at a startup networking event. He mentors me on entrepreneurship and often shares valuable business insights.

name: Maliha Sultana
bio: Neighbor who loves experimenting with new recipes. We frequently exchange homemade dishes and celebrate festivals together.
